market_overview.headline: Market structure deteriorating with SPY breaking down below 8W EMA while QQQ holds unstacked bullish structure.
market_overview.detail: 32.7% of stocks remain in Full Bull but 38.7% are in bearish structures. BTC in Full Bear down -15.9% vs 21W adds risk-off pressure.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates (with Bullish Crossover Alerts)

items.name: Netflix, Inc.
items.note: Streaming giant rallying above 13W EMA in bear structure — potential early reversal signal

items.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.49%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just below 21W (0.82%) — bullish cross potential
items.note: Mega-cap tech showing EMA compression with bullish crossover potential after -1.8% decline from 21W

items.name: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.
items.note: Cybersecurity leader rallying above 13W EMA after bear structure — sector rotation play

items.name: BYD Co., Ltd.
items.note: Chinese EV manufacturer with 8W EMA approaching bullish cross of 13W

items.name: Oracle Corporation
items.note: Enterprise software giant rallying +1.3% vs 8W while down -11.5% from 21W — potential cloud recovery play

pullback_setups.headline: High-Quality Pullback Entries in Established Uptrends

items.name: Southern Copper Corporation
items.note: Large-cap copper miner with orderly low-volume pullback in strong uptrend — commodity rotation play

items.name: Freeport-McMoRan, Inc.
items.note: Another copper play with clean low-volume pullback structure — mining sector strength continues

items.name: Newmont Corporation
items.note: Gold miner showing orderly selling on light volume — precious metals consolidation

items.name: Analog Devices, Inc.
items.note: Semiconductor stock with low-volume pullback suggests controlled profit-taking in strong trend

momentum_themes.headline: Storage/Memory and Financial Momentum Leaders
momentum_themes.detail: Memory/storage stocks showing explosive momentum with SNDK up 51% and WDC/MU showing strong spreads. Energy minerals continue leadership with 100% bull participation.

sector_analysis.headline: Defensive Rotation Into Commodities and Industrials

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with avg +15.1% above 21W EMA
Mining stocks showing defensive strength with pullback opportunities

weakest.note: Complete bearish breakdown in business services
Massive tech rotation with only 9.5% bullish participation
Banking sector under pressure with 56% bearish structures

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into defensive commodities and industrials. Energy/mining sectors show 100% bull participation while tech services collapse.

items.text: SPY broke below 8W EMA — broad market uptrend structure compromised
Technology services showing 90.5% bearish participation — major sector breakdown
BTC Full Bear at -15.9% from 21W EMA signals risk-off environment
Financial sector weakness with 56% bearish structures threatens credit conditions
